fragments.name: json-structure-authoring-surface
fragments.description: Declares JSON Structure as the first human authoring surface for structural inputs while preserving the canonical structural model as authority.

fragments.name: derived-bridge-classes
fragments.description: Declares bridge classes as derived interop and codegen surfaces that consume authoritative kernel state without becoming authority.

fragments.name: runtime-actor-classes
fragments.description: Declares adapters, runtime controllers, generators, validators, and emitters as derived operational actor classes.

fragments.name: promotion-and-lineage-guardrails
fragments.description: Declares the promotion, lineage, and side-effect guardrails that keep bridge and runtime outputs on the derived side of the boundary.

notes: Authoritative extension module for JSON-family bridge semantics and runtime actor declarations. It declares operational classes without moving execution behavior into the authority plane.
